sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61712" key="lake/rnion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰκέρνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> Lat. <sense id="n61712.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lacerna, cloak, Fouilles de Doura-Europos</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:378" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">378</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
